mapper.select: WITH Latest_AI_Model AS ( SELECT b.model_id, b.node_num, b.if_num, b.ipsdn_if_id, b.in_threshold_value, b.out_threshold_value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY b.node_num, b.if_num ORDER BY b.predict_datetime DESC ) AS rn FROM nia.tb_ai_model b WHERE b.predictyn = 'Y' ) SELECT b.node_num, n.node_id, n.node_nm, b.if_num, p.if_id, p.if_nm, b.model_id, b.ipsdn_if_id, b.in_threshold_value, b.out_threshold_value FROM Latest_AI_Model b INNER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst n ON n.node_num = b.node_num INNER JOIN resource.tb_port_mst p ON p.if_num = b.if_num WHERE b.rn = 1 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM nia.tb_att_ai_tca_model t WHERE t.node_num = b.node_num AND t.if_num = b.if_num AND t.tca_alert_time >= CURRENT_DATE );

SELECT id, if_id, tx_bit_rate, rx_bit_rate, tx_pkt_rate, rx_pkt_rate, TO_CHAR(measured_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS measured_datetime, direction FROM ( SELECT -- 1. Out 트래픽이 임계값을 넘은 경우들 t.id, t.if_id, t.tx_bit_rate, t.rx_bit_rate, t.tx_pkt_rate, t.rx_pkt_rate, t.measured_datetime, 'out' AS direction, (t.tx_bit_rate / NULLIF(p.out_yhat_upper, 0)) AS severity FROM IP_SDN.TB_LINK_TRAFFIC t INNER JOIN nia.tb_ai_predict p ON t.measured_datetime = p.ds WHERE t.if_id = #{ipsdnIfId} AND p.model_id = #{modelId} AND t.measured_datetime >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{lastCheckTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.MS +0900') AND t.tx_bit_rate > p.out_yhat_upper UNION ALL SELECT -- 2. In 트래픽이 임계값을 넘은 경우들 t.id, t.if_id, t.tx_bit_rate, t.rx_bit_rate, t.tx_pkt_rate, t.rx_pkt_rate, t.measured_datetime, 'in' AS direction, (t.rx_bit_rate / NULLIF(p.in_yhat_upper, 0)) AS severity FROM IP_SDN.TB_LINK_TRAFFIC t INNER JOIN nia.tb_ai_predict p ON t.measured_datetime = p.ds WHERE t.if_id = #{ipsdnIfId} AND p.model_id = #{modelId} AND t.measured_datetime >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{lastCheckTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.MS +0900') AND t.rx_bit_rate > p.in_yhat_upper ) AS combined_alerts ORDER BY measured_datetime ASC, -- 1순위: 가장 먼저 발생한 장애 시간 severity DESC -- 2순위: 동일 시간이라면 더 심하게 넘은 것 우선 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nia.tb_att_ai_tca_model ( model_id, node_num, if_num, tca_alert_yn, tca_alert_time, tca_alert_direction ) VALUES ( #{modelId}, #{nodeNum}, #{ifNum}, 'Y', #{measuredDatetime}, #{direction} );
